name: marine_conservation_whistleblower_cedar_car_fair
premise: An internal crisis team convened after contradictory signals hit leadership from operations, legal, and external partners at once. In Marine Conservation, the situation tagged internally around marine conservation whistleblower cedar car fair has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Hector Ibrahim
agents.identity: I am Hector Ibrahim, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Marine Conservation. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Omar Sato
agents.identity: I am Omar Sato, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Marine Conservation. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will sequence a conservative rollout: smallest blast radius first, documented exceptions only, and real appeals paths—even if care advocates call that foot-dragging.
I will push a fast, organization-wide lever because partial fixes may leave the worst harm untouched—even if that compresses protections for fairness.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Hector Ibrahim must choose under care versus fairness. What does Hector Ibrahim do?
